articles.title: Premier BSA/AML Gaming Conference Returns to Las Vegas
articles.description: LAS VEGAS , June 16, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The BSA-AML Compliance Group is thrilled to announce the return of the Annual BSA/AML Gaming Conference, the most respected and comprehensive anti-money laundering compliance event in the gaming industry. The 2026 conference will be held at Planet Hollywood Resort & Casino in Las Vegas from September 15–17, with a dedicated "Fundamentals Day" on Monday, September 14 for newer professionals and those seeking a refresher in core BSA/AML principles. Headline Keynotes and Distinguished Guests Announced This year's event features presentations from some of the most influential figures in financial crime enforcement and policy: Michael Dreitzer , Chairman of the Nevada Gaming Control Board, will deliver a keynote ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

articles.title: 👋 Jordan Carrillo bids farewell to Pumas, Chivas look likely next
articles.description: The talented Mexican forward, Jordan Carrillo, has officially announced his departure from Pumas UNAM through an emotional farewell letter addressed to the entire university community. Carrillo used his social media to share a message bringing to a close what he called "a very special chapter" in his professional career. "To the university fans, thank you for always being there. For cheering tirelessly, for pushing us to give our best." The red-and-white board is adding to its ranks a young, game-changing player with the dynamic profile the squad demands. Are we about to see the best version of Jordan with Chivas? This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇪🇸 here.
